Title: Minimalist Graphic Chest Pocket Print Sweatshirt
Description:
This versatile long-sleeve crewneck sweatshirt features a subtle, pocket-style graphic print on the chest. Perfect for everyday casual wear, this design adds a unique, thoughtful detail without overpowering your style.

Crafted from soft, comfortable material, it offers a relaxed fit and excellent durability, making it ideal for lounging or streetwear looks.

  • Comfortable Fit: The relaxed, long-sleeve design ensures all-day wearability.
  • Subtle Detail: The graphic is placed within a mock chest pocket, giving a tailored, curated feel.
  • Easy to Style: Pairs effortlessly with jeans, joggers, or shorts for a cohesive, casual look.

Whether you're grabbing coffee with friends, running errands, or needing a comfortable weekend staple, this sweatshirt is designed to be a go-to wardrobe piece. It also makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for friends and family.
